title: Develop work practices to accommodate cultural identity

competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop work practices to accommodate cultural identity demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Investigate government policies and practices relating to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Peoples

pcs.text: Document the government policies and practices that affect Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Peoples

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the government policies and practices that affect Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Peoples.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and document how policies and practices may affect Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Peoples in the workplace.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe and record the impacts of changes on the local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Community or family.

elements.title: Outline effects of current work-related issues on Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Communities

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define and communicate key work-related issues that impact on Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Communities today to management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define and communicate key work-related issues that impact on Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Communities today to management.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify methods of addressing key issues and resolutions to be applied.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify elements that may provide a positive working experience.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate elements that affect cultural identity in work environments into the work practices.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult staff in the preparation and design of the work practices according to Community and organisational protocols and guidelines.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement positive strategies for dealing with work practices that impact on cultural identity.
